title: Study to Assess the Safety of Amantadine Hydrochloride (HCl) Intravenous (IV) Solution (MR-301) in Patients With Severe Traumatic Brain Injury (TBI).

skipped_criteria: Inclusion #2: TBI confirmed by CT scan or MRI — presumed_tbi is used as a proxy but imaging confirmation cannot be verified from schema fields.
Inclusion #3: Trauma sustained between 72 hours and 1 week prior — temporal/time-since-injury field not available in schema.
Inclusion #4: Abbreviated Injury Score (AIS) ≤ 2 — AIS field not available in schema.
Inclusion #5: Admitted to acute care no less than 2 days prior to randomization — admission duration field not available in schema.
Inclusion #7: Unable to consistently follow commands or engage in functional communication per CRS-R score — CRS-R field not available in schema.
Inclusion #8: At least one reactive pupil — pupil reactivity field not available in schema.
Inclusion #9: Must have a Legally Authorized Representative able to provide consent — consent/LAR field not available in schema.
Inclusion #10: Stable ICP at investigator discretion and PaO2 > 60 mmHg — ICP and PaO2 fields not available in schema.
Exclusion #1: Life expectancy less than 24 hours — prognosis/life expectancy field not available in schema.
Exclusion #4: Bilaterally fixed dilated pupils — pupil reactivity field not available in schema.
Exclusion #5: History of medical/psychiatric disorder or severe concomitant disease interfering with assessment — medical history fields not available in schema.
Exclusion #6: Poorly controlled seizure more than one per month — seizure history/frequency field not available in schema.
Exclusion #7: Prior history of status epilepticus — medical history field not available in schema.
Exclusion #8: Prior treatment with or sensitivity to amantadine HCl or amantadine — medication history/allergy field not available in schema.
Exclusion #9a-e: Screening lab values (ANC, hemoglobin, platelets, liver enzymes, eGFR) outside normal range — lab value fields not available in schema.
Exclusion #10: Treatment with investigational drug, CNS stimulant, or dopamine antagonist/agonist within 4 weeks — medication history field not available in schema.
Exclusion #11: History of NYHA Class 3 or 4 Congestive Heart Failure within last 5 years — cardiac history field not available in schema.
Exclusion #12: Females who are nursing or planning to become pregnant — nursing status and future pregnancy intent not available in schema (pregnant/unknown covered by exclusion rule).
Exclusion #13: Any other clinically significant medical condition as determined by investigator — subjective investigator judgment not encodable in schema.
Exclusion #14: Prolonged QT interval — ECG/QT interval field not available in schema.
Exclusion #15: Treatment with systemic anticholinergic medication within 1 week prior to screening — medication history field not available in schema.
